ast.name: textContent
ast.source: When enabled, every keystroke triggers a "live" refresh of your theme. This can lead to unwanted styling and possibly make Obsidian unusable.
ast.target: 启用后，每次按键都会触发主题的“实时”刷新。这可能导致不想要的样式变化，并可能使 Obsidian 无法使用。

ast.name: confirm
ast.source: You have an unsaved CSS rule form open. Editing another rule will discard your changes. Continue?
ast.target: 您有一个未保存的 CSS 规则表单处于打开状态。编辑另一个规则将丢弃您的更改。继续吗？

ast.name: confirm
ast.source: The @font-face has been saved as a new CSS rule. Click "OK" to reload the "Custom Theme Studio" view or if you have unsaved changes, click "Cancel" to reload the view manually at a later time.
ast.target: @font-face 已保存为新的 CSS 规则。点击“确定”重新加载“自定义主题工作室”视图，或者如果您有未保存的更改，请点击“取消”以稍后手动重新加载视图。

ast.name: confirm
ast.source: This will overwrite your current settings and cannot be undone. Continue?
ast.target: 这将覆盖您当前的设置，且无法撤销。继续吗？

ast.name: confirm
ast.source: You may have unsaved changes. Reloading the view will reload all forms. Continue?
ast.target: 您可能有未保存的更改。重新加载视图将重新加载所有表单。继续吗？

ast.name: confirm
ast.source: Are you sure you want to reset all theme customizations? This cannot be undone.
ast.target: 您确定要重置所有主题自定义项吗？此操作无法撤销。

ast.name: confirm
ast.source: The snippet has been saved as a new CSS rule. Click "OK" to reload the "Custom Theme Studio" view or if you have unsaved changes, click "Cancel" to reload the view manually at a later time.
ast.target: 代码片段已保存为新的 CSS 规则。点击“确定”重新加载“自定义主题工作室”视图，或者如果您有未保存的更改，请点击“取消”以稍后手动重新加载视图。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A variable is prefixed with two dashes --, followed by the variable name.
ast.target: 变量以两个破折号 -- 开头，后跟变量名。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A variable value can be any valid CSS value.
ast.target: 变量值可以是任何有效的 CSS 值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter a font name which is used to identify this font in your CSS rules/variables.
ast.target: 输入一个字体名称，用于在您的 CSS 规则/变量中标识此字体。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose a font file to create a new @font-face rule
ast.target: 选择一个字体文件以创建新的 @font-face 规则

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggle your custom theme on or off.
ast.target: 切换您的自定义主题开或关。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When to update CSS after changing variable values. Choose "input" for live updates (every keystroke) or "change" to update only when you finish editing (clicking away from the field).
ast.target: 更改变量值后何时更新 CSS。选择“input”进行实时更新（每次按键），或选择“change”仅在完成编辑（点击离开字段）时更新。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable a color picker for CSS variables that have a default hex color value.
ast.target: 为具有默认十六进制颜色值的 CSS 变量启用颜色选择器。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable font imports to create @font-face CSS rules.
ast.target: 启用字体导入以创建 @font-face CSS 规则。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Warn before discarding unsaved changes when closing or switching between CSS editors.
ast.target: 在关闭或切换 CSS 编辑器时，丢弃未保存的更改前发出警告。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose the style of CSS selectors generated when picking elements. "minimal" creates short selectors, "balanced" includes the tag name, and "specific" includes all attributes.
ast.target: 选择拾取元素时生成的 CSS 选择器样式。“minimal”创建短选择器，“balanced”包含标签名，“specific”包含所有属性。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, prioritize class selectors (e.g., .my-class) over data attributes.
ast.target: 启用后，优先使用类选择器（例如 .my-class）而非数据属性。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, always include the HTML tag (e.g., div[data-foo] instead of [data-foo]).
ast.target: 启用后，始终包含 HTML 标签（例如 div[data-foo] 而不是 [data-foo]）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Attributes matching these patterns will be excluded from minimal and balanced selectors (one per line). Supports wildcards like "data-tooltip-*". Specific mode includes all attributes.
ast.target: 匹配这些模式的属性将从最小化和平衡选择器中排除（每行一个）。支持通配符，如“data-tooltip-*”。特定模式包含所有属性。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically populate the CSS editor with common properties (color, background, font, etc.) when selecting an element.
ast.target: 选择元素时，自动用常用属性（颜色、背景、字体等）填充 CSS 编辑器。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically preview changes "live" as you make them. Changes become permanent once the CSS is saved.
ast.target: 在您进行更改时自动“实时”预览。更改在 CSS 保存后变为永久。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Delay before live-previewing CSS changes while typing (requires auto-apply). Lower values = faster feedback but may cause performance issues.
ast.target: 在输入时实时预览 CSS 更改前的延迟（需要自动应用）。较低的值 = 更快的反馈，但可能导致性能问题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show inline color picker for hex/rgb values.
ast.target: 为十六进制/RGB 值显示内联颜色选择器。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show auto-completion suggestions while typing CSS properties and values.
ast.target: 在输入 CSS 属性和值时显示自动完成建议。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show Obsidian CSS variables in auto-completion (requires live auto-completion).
ast.target: 在自动完成中显示 Obsidian CSS 变量（需要实时自动完成）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: CSS editor color theme. "auto" matches your Obsidian theme.
ast.target: CSS 编辑器颜色主题。“auto”匹配您的 Obsidian 主题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Syntax highlighting theme when Obsidian is in light mode.
ast.target: Obsidian 处于浅色模式时的语法高亮主题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Syntax highlighting theme when Obsidian is in dark mode.
ast.target: Obsidian 处于深色模式时的语法高亮主题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Keyboard shortcut scheme for the CSS editor.
ast.target: CSS 编辑器的键盘快捷键方案。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the font size of the CSS editor.
ast.target: 设置 CSS 编辑器的字体大小。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Font family for the CSS editor (e.g., "fira code", "monaco"). Leave empty for default.
ast.target: CSS 编辑器的字体系列（例如“fira code”、“monaco”）。留空则使用默认值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Indentation width (spaces per tab level). Standard is 2 or 4.
ast.target: 缩进宽度（每个制表符级别的空格数）。标准是 2 或 4。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Wrap long lines instead of scrolling horizontally.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show line numbers in the CSS editor.
ast.target: 在 CSS 编辑器中显示行号。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The name or title for your exported theme.
ast.target: 导出主题的名称或标题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Your name as the theme author.
ast.target: 您作为主题作者的姓名。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: URL to your GitHub profile page (e.g. https://github.com/username).
ast.target: 您 GitHub 个人资料页面的 URL（例如 https://github.com/username）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Include disabled rules in exported themes (useful for sharing themes with optional features)."
ast.target: 在导出的主题中包含禁用的规则（适用于共享具有可选功能的主题）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically format CSS using prettier formatter.
ast.target: 使用 prettier 格式化程序自动格式化 CSS。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Auto-scroll to expanded sections or active editors for easier navigation.
ast.target: 自动滚动到展开的部分或活动的编辑器，以便于导航。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Export or import all plugin settings. Import will overwrite current settings. File saved to vault root as cts_settings.json.
ast.target: 导出或导入所有插件设置。导入将覆盖当前设置。文件保存到保险库根目录，名为 cts_settings.json。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Most settings under CSS variables & CSS rules require the plugin's view to be reloaded to take effect.
ast.target: CSS 变量和 CSS 规则下的大多数设置需要重新加载插件视图才能生效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Control console logging verbosity for debugging
ast.target: 控制用于调试的控制台日志详细程度

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 重置所有主题自定义设置。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Include disabled CSS rules when exporting
ast.target: 导出时包含禁用的CSS规则

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Search and choose a snippet to import
ast.target: 搜索并选择要导入的代码片段

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Click to expand/collapse CSS editor preferences
ast.target: 点击展开/折叠CSS编辑器首选项

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Use of document.insertLines is deprecated. Use the insertFullLines method instead.
ast.target: document.insertLines 已弃用。请改用 insertFullLines 方法。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Use of document.removeLines is deprecated. Use the removeFullLines method instead.
ast.target: document.removeLines 已弃用。请改用 removeFullLines 方法。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Use of document.insertNewLine is deprecated. Use insertMergedLines(position, ['', '']) instead.
ast.target: document.insertNewLine 已弃用。请改用 insertMergedLines(position, ['', ''])。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: This is an obsolete command. Please use `openCommandPalette` instead.
ast.target: 这是一个已弃用的命令。请改用 `openCommandPalette`。

ast.name: warn
ast.target: 未找到自定义变量容器

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Snippets are enabled and require that "live auto completion" be enabled. Please disable the below "snippets" toggle before disabling this setting.
ast.target: 代码片段已启用，并要求启用“实时自动补全”。请在禁用此设置前，先禁用下方的“代码片段”开关。

ast.target: 请在启用此设置前，先启用上方的“实时自动补全”开关。

ast.target: 在下方添加光标（跳过当前）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Check whether the file's first docblock comment contains '@noprettier' or '@noformat' to determine if it should be formatted.
ast.target: 检查文件的第一个文档块注释是否包含'@noprettier'或'@noformat'，以确定是否应进行格式化。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Print (to stderr) where a cursor at the given position would move to after formatting.
ast.target: （输出到标准错误）给定位置的光标在格式化后将移动到何处。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Which end of line characters to apply.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Line Feed only (\n), common on Linux and macOS as well as inside git repos
ast.target: 仅换行符 (\\n)，常见于 Linux 和 macOS 系统，以及 git 仓库内部

ast.name: description
ast.source: Carriage Return + Line Feed characters (\r\n), common on Windows
ast.target: 回车符 + 换行符 (\\r\\n)，常见于 Windows 系统

ast.name: description
ast.source: Carriage Return character only (\r), used very rarely
ast.target: 仅回车符 (\\r)，使用非常罕见

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Maintain existing
(mixed values within one file are normalised by looking at what's used after the first line)
ast.target: 保持现有设置\n（通过检查第一行之后使用的值来规范化单个文件中的混合值）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specify the input filepath. This will be used to do parser inference.
ast.target: 指定输入文件路径。此路径将用于进行解析器推断。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Insert @format pragma into file's first docblock comment.
ast.target: 在文件的第一个文档块注释中插入 @format 编译指示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add a plugin. Multiple plugins can be passed as separate `--plugin`s.
ast.target: 添加一个插件。多个插件可以作为单独的 `--plugin` 参数传递。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The line length where Prettier will try wrap.
ast.target: Prettier 将尝试换行的行长度。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Format code ending at a given character offset (exclusive).
The range will extend forwards to the end of the selected statement.
ast.target: 格式化代码，结束于给定的字符偏移量（不包括）。\n该范围将向前延伸到所选语句的末尾。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Format code starting at a given character offset.
The range will extend backwards to the start of the first line containing the selected statement.
ast.target: 格式化代码，开始于给定的字符偏移量。\n该范围将向后延伸到包含所选语句的第一行的开头。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Require either '@prettier' or '@format' to be present in the file's first docblock comment in order for it to be formatted.
ast.target: 要求文件的第一个文档块注释中必须存在 '@prettier' 或 '@format'，才能对其进行格式化。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Number of spaces per indentation level.
ast.target: 每个缩进级别的空格数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indent with tabs instead of spaces.
ast.target: 使用制表符而不是空格进行缩进。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Control how Prettier formats quoted code embedded in the file.
ast.target: 控制 Prettier 如何格式化文件中嵌入的带引号代码。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Format embedded code if Prettier can automatically identify it.
ast.target: 如果 Prettier 能自动识别，则格式化嵌入的代码。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 永不自动格式化嵌入的代码。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Keep as multi-line, if there is a newline between the opening brace and first property.
ast.target: 如果左花括号和第一个属性之间有换行符，则保持多行格式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fit to a single line when possible.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Use single quotes instead of double quotes.
ast.target: 使用单引号代替双引号。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Wrap prose if it exceeds the print width.
ast.target: 如果文本超过打印宽度，则换行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Put > of opening tags on the last line instead of on a new line.
ast.target: 将开始标签的 > 放在最后一行，而不是新行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enforce single attribute per line in HTML, Vue and JSX.
ast.target: 在 HTML、Vue 和 JSX 中强制每行一个属性。

ast.name: title
ast.source: an array of the following values
